title: [ExportVerilog] Zero width error in commented out SV

features.name: zero_width_constant_in_instance_connection
features.description: Code should include a module instance connection where a zero-width constant (0 bits) is connected to an input port

features.name: zero_width_port_in_module_signature
features.description: Code should include a module with a zero-width port declaration in its input signature

features.name: commented_out_zero_width_connection_in_instance
features.description: Code should include an instance with a commented-out connection for a zero-width signal using double-slash comment style
